name: io.github.Opafex/mcp-enrichment
description: Multi-source entity enrichment: company data, contacts, email verification, and phone validation

environmentVariables.description: Clearbit API key for company and contact enrichment
environmentVariables.name: CLEARBIT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Hunter.io API key for email discovery and verification
environmentVariables.name: HUNTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Apollo.io API key for contact and company data
environmentVariables.name: APOLLO_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Twilio Account SID for phone validation
environmentVariables.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID

environmentVariables.description: Twilio Auth Token for phone validation
environmentVariables.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Cache TTL in seconds for enrichment results (default: 86400)
environmentVariables.name: ENRICHMENT_CACHE_TTL
